actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Great ideas stand tall among us like buildings.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Like a great structure, theories are constructed with many hands.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Make your theories as thick and hard as concrete.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Theories should have strong foundations like any structure.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Make sure your theories are built correctly.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Build your theories so that they reach the sky.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: If your theory isn't strong like a tower it may topple over.
